tree.name: Adou Thiero
tree.tradeDescription: 7-team trade: Lakers acquired Thiero from Nets, sent cash and Rocco Zikarsky to Timberwolves
tree.note: Arkansas forward, originally drafted 31st overall in 2024 by Nets

assetsGivenUp.name: Rocco Zikarsky
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Lakers traded Lachlan Olbrich and cash to Bulls for Zikarsky
assetsGivenUp.note: Australian center, acquired from Bulls day before 7-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 2nd Round Pick (#36)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Lakers acquired pick #36 (Lachlan Olbrich) from Nets as part of a 7-team trade involving Kevin Durant to Houston, Jalen Green to Phoenix, and others
assetsGivenUp.note: Pick originally BKN own; traded to ATL (2018, Jeremy Lin trade), to NYK (2022, Cam Reddish trade), back to BKN (2024, Mikal Bridges trade), then to LAL in 7-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Cash Considerations
assetsGivenUp.note: Cash sent to Timberwolves as part of 7-team trade
